compliance.assurance_rationale: FDA 21 CFR Part 11 §11.10(e) Audit trails — detecting audit-log tampering is the integrity signal Part 11 explicitly requires on the secure time-stamped audit trail.
HITRUST CSF v11 09.aa Audit logging — tampering detection evidences the audit-log-integrity sub-requirement.
SWIFT CSP CSCF v2025 6.4 Logging and monitoring — SWIFT CSP names audit-log integrity as an essential monitoring control.
SOX ITGC audit-trail continuity control — financial-system audit-log tamper detection is a required ITGC control tested during financial audits.
